---
description: "Review a blog post for quality, accuracy, and consistency"
agent: "blog-reviewer"
tools: [read, search]
argument-hint: "Path to the blog post file, e.g. src/content/my-post.md"
---

Review the specified blog post against the blog conventions and provide actionable feedback.

Categorise each issue as `[MUST FIX]`, `[SHOULD FIX]`, or `[SUGGESTION]`.
